data.four_set_effect: Using an Elemental Burst regenerates 2 Energy for all party members (excluding the wearer) every 2s for 6s. This effect cannot stack.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A prestigious circlet. However, the royal insignia has been scratched out, and it is no longer the symbol of distinguished status that it once was.
circlet_of_logos.title: Exile's Circlet

flower_of_life.desc: A withered flower worn on the shirt. Its former owner insisted on wearing it even in exile, so it must mean something.
flower_of_life.title: Exile's Flower

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A dull goblet made of a heavy metal. It was once inlaid with gemstones, but they have since been stripped off.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Exile's Goblet

plume_of_death.desc: Not an actual accessory per se. Just a random bird feather that was found somewhere in the wilderness by the exile.
plume_of_death.title: Exile's Feather

sands_of_eon.desc: Even after the crystal watch face was shattered and the hands lost, its former owner kept it until the end.
sands_of_eon.title: Exile's Pocket Watch

list.desc: It all happened before the exiled aristocrat was involved in the family feud.</br>This flower bloomed before the first blood was shed.</br>Having witnessed the cruelty of humanity, the exile left his kindness and gentleness in the past.</br>But this faded flower and the innocent smile he once had will always be his treasure.</br>
list.title: Exile's Flower

list.desc: As a child, the exile lived in a noble house. His childhood was carefree, and his playground was a palace built with silver.</br>In the times of old, the circlet of his father was a symbol of gentility and nobility.</br>However, years later, a family feud painted the collapsing palace blood-red.</br>The circlet became the evidence of the exile's crime and has been with the exile ever since.</br>
list.title: Exile's Circlet

list.desc: This silver goblet is a family heirloom of an exiled aristocrat. The exterior was once inlaid with a gem engraved with his family crest.</br>But after the exile had brought shame to his family, he carved out the symbol of which he was once proud.</br>As a result, this cup is broken and can no longer hold liquid.</br>But the exile still carries it with him until the end of his journey.</br>
list.title: Exile's Goblet

list.desc: Through plains and forests, the exile traveled alone in the wild.</br>Through thick layers of dark clouds, an azure feather fell on his shoulder.</br>The feather came from a panicked bird escaping from the falcon, just like the exile.</br>The feather represents the spirit of a nestless, free bird, just like the exile.</br>
list.title: Exile's Feather

list.desc: The aristocrat acquired this pocket watch back in his youth.</br>This delicate timepiece recorded every moment of his childhood.</br>But tragedy brought his carefree days to an abrupt end.</br>The aristocrat was forced into a long and lonesome exile.</br>
list.title: Exile's Pocket Watch
